hero.headline2: 몇 달이 아닌 몇 주 만에 출시하세요.
hero.subheadline: 멀티테넌시, AI 인프라, 결제 시스템 등 출시에 필요한 모든 것이 갖춰진 프로덕션 준비 모노레포입니다.

item0.title: 처음부터 멀티테넌트
item0.description: 행 수준 보안, 조직 격리, 테넌트 라우팅이 모든 레이어에 내장되어 있습니다. 나중에 덧붙인 기능이 아닙니다.

item1.title: AI 네이티브 인프라
item1.description: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini를 아우르는 프로바이더 추상화. 애플리케이션 코드 변경 없이 모델을 교체할 수 있습니다.

item2.title: 결제 시스템 완비
item2.description: Stripe 구독, 사용량 미터, 웹훅 핸들러 — 데모용이 아닌 프로덕션 수준으로 준비되어 있습니다.

about.title: About Us — Nebutra
about.description: Nebutra, our mission, values, and the team behind the open-source enterprise SaaS framework.
about.heading: Nebutra 소개
about.subheading: Building the future of enterprise SaaS — open-source, AI-native, and production-ready.
about.missionP1: Nebutra exists to eliminate the months of boilerplate work that every SaaS team faces. We believe the best way to build great products is to start with a great foundation.
about.missionP2: Our open-source framework provides multi-tenancy, billing, authentication, and AI infrastructure out of the box — so teams can focus on what makes their product unique.

0.title: Open Source First
0.description: We build in the open. Our core framework is AGPLv3-licensed and always will be.

1.title: Production-Ready
1.description: Every feature ships battle-tested. No demo-ware, no half-baked abstractions.

2.title: Developer Experience
2.description: Great DX is not optional. We obsess over APIs, docs, and error messages.

3.title: Security by Default
3.description: Row-level security, encrypted secrets, and audit logs are built in from day one.

4.title: Community Driven
4.description: Our roadmap is shaped by the developers who use Nebutra every day.

5.title: Ship Fast, Ship Often
5.description: We release frequently, iterate quickly, and never let perfect be the enemy of shipped.

faq.title: FAQ — Nebutra
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Nebutra, pricing, features, and support.
faq.heading: 자주 묻는 질문
faq.subheading: Find answers to common questions about Nebutra.

0.a: Nebutra Sailor is an open-source, production-ready SaaS framework built with Next.js, featuring multi-tenancy, billing, authentication, and AI infrastructure out of the box.

1.a: Yes, Nebutra Sailor is AGPLv3-licensed and free to use. We also offer managed cloud plans for teams that want hosted infrastructure and premium support.

2.a: Run our CLI command to scaffold a new project, then follow the quickstart guide in our documentation. You can be up and running in under 5 minutes.

0.a: We offer Free, Starter, Pro, and Enterprise plans. Visit our pricing page for full details.

1.q: Can I change plans at any time?
1.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, downgrades at the next billing cycle.

2.a: Yes, annual billing is available at a discount. Contact sales for enterprise pricing.

3.a: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe. Enterprise customers can pay via invoice.

4.a: Yes, all paid plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

0.a: We support OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini out of the box, with a unified API that lets you swap providers without code changes.

1.a: Multi-tenancy is built into every layer — from Postgres row-level security to middleware-based tenant routing and isolated org data.

2.a: Absolutely. Nebutra is designed for self-hosting. Deploy to any platform that supports Node.js and Postgres.

3.a: Nebutra uses PostgreSQL (via Neon or Supabase) with Drizzle ORM for type-safe database access.

0.a: Yes. We implement encryption in transit and at rest, row-level security, audit logging, and regular security assessments.

1.a: Yes. We provide data export, deletion, and consent management tools to help you comply with GDPR and other privacy regulations.

2.a: We are currently pursuing SOC 2 Type II certification. Contact us for our current security documentation.

3.a: Community support is 24/7 via Discord. Paid support is available Monday-Friday, 9am-6pm PST.

0.q: What support options do you offer?
0.a: Community support is 24/7 via Discord. Paid support is available Monday-Friday, 9am-6pm PST.

1.a: Community support is 24/7 via Discord. Paid support is available Monday-Friday, 9am-6pm PST.

2.a: Yes, we offer architecture reviews, custom integrations, and migration assistance. Contact sales for details.

faq.ctaDescription: Our team is happy to help. Reach out to us directly.

metadata.description: 몇 달이 아닌 몇 주 만에 SaaS를 출시하세요. 멀티테넌시, 결제, 인증, AI가 내장되어 있습니다. 프로덕션 준비 완료, AGPLv3 라이선스.
